  • agora-react-native-rtm +5stars39 - A React Native Agora RealTime-Message Cloud Service Wrapper.

    • Utilities

    Components

    UI

  • rn-placeholder ★1139stars1.8k - Display some placeholder stuff before rendering your text or media content in React Native (+ React Native Web!)
  • action-sheet-rn ★1stars22 - Probably the most declarative API for ActionSheets in React Native
  • rn-material-textinputstars2 - A simple TextInput wrapper for material styling in iOS and Android with Customizable styles & Animated label.
  • rn-action-pickerstars1 - A simple action picker for iOS and Android. Renders Native ActionSheetIOS Component in iOS and custom ActionSheet lookalike component in Android.
  • rn-collapsible-sectionstars1 - A collapsible section / section list with customizable section body and child body. Supports both iOS and Android.

  • react-native-aws-signature ★42stars44 - help generate signature required for using AWS API. Necessary to use S3, ec2, or other services.
  • react-native-html-parser ★38stars67 - parse html in react-native
  • pixels-catcher ★26stars83 - Library for testing React Native UI components and screens
  • react-native-hour-format ★20stars24 - Get hour format from OS settings.
  • react-native-crypto ★6stars16 - implementation of crypto for React Native

  • react-native-communications ★871stars1k - Easily call, email, text or iMessage someone in React Native
  • react-native-quick-actions ★593stars901 - A react-native interface for 3D Touch home screen quick actions
  • react-native-barcodescanner ★491stars531 - A barcode scanner component for react native - not maintained anymore - use react-native-camera.
  • react-native-location ★425stars757 - Native GPS location support for React Native.
  • react-native-background-fetch ★373stars994 - iOS BackgroundFetch API implementation. Awakens a suspended iOS app in the background to execute a callbackFn about every 15 min.
  • react-native-queue ★359stars646 - Your swiss army knife for task management in React Native - easily manage background tasks that run periodically when app is closed and dedicated worker threads.
  • react-native-sensors ★355stars664 - Platform independent wrapper for sensors like Gyroscope, Accelerometer and Magnetometer with RxJS interface
  • react-native-android-sms-listener ★194stars293 - Allows you to listen for incoming SMS messages
  • react-native-ble ★157stars163 - React Native BLE using noble api surface
  • react-native-pinch ★130stars181 - SSL pinning for react native

  • react-native-callkit ★94stars121 - iOS 10 CallKit framework for React Native

  • react-native-phone-call ★76stars146 - A simple way to initiate a phone call in React Native
  • react-native-barcode-scanner ★60stars61 - Barcode scanner for React Native

  • react-native-nfc-ios ★52stars58 - Easy to use CoreNFC for React Native
  • react-native-voip-push-notification ★48stars148 - iOS prioritized VoIP Push Notification

  • react-native-wifi-manager ★29stars31 - Wifi Connection Manager for React Native on Android

  • apsl-react-native-button ★653stars725 - React Native button component with rounded corners.
  • react-native-popup-menu ★653stars1.2k - Extensible popup menu component for React Native.
  • react-native-qrcode ★644stars829 - react-native qrcode generator
  • react-native-parsed-text ★552stars988 - Parse text and make them into multiple React Native Text elements
  • react-native-dropdown ★507stars631 - A better Select dropdown menu for react-native
  • react-native-parallax ★479stars561 - Parallax effects for React Native using Animated API
  • react-native-sketch ★467stars629 - A react-native <Sketch /> component to draw with touch events.
  • react-native-button-component ★434stars511 - A Beautiful, Customizable React Native Button component for iOS & Android
  • react-native-refresher ★419stars453 - A React Native pull to refresh ListView completely written in js. Also supports custom animations.
  • react-native-carousel ★406stars419 - Simple carousel component for react-native
  • react-native-radio-buttons ★399stars417 - A react component to implement custom radio buttons-like behaviors: multiple options, only on can be selected at once.
  • react-native-accordion ★390stars433 - An Accordion Component for React Native
  • react-native-message-bar ★384stars438 - A module for presenting notifications via an animated message bar at the top/bottom of the screen, highly customizable, for React Native (Android and iOS) projects.
  • react-native-fit-image ★383stars546 - Responsive image component to fit perfectly itself.
  • react-native-alphabetlistview ★372stars460 - A ListView with a sidebar to jump to sections directly, based on johanneslumpe's react-native-selectablesectionlistview
  • react-native-responsive-image ★344stars393 - Most elegant Responsive Image component
  • react-native-modal-picker ★333stars393 - A cross-platform (iOS / Android), selector/picker component for React Native that is highly customizable and supports sections.
  • react-native-gesture-recognizers ★313stars352 - Gesture recognizer decorators for react-native
  • react-native-grid-view ★276stars278 - React Native Grid/Collection View component
  • react-native-md-textinput ★275stars314 - React Native TextInput styled with Material Design.
  • react-native-timer-mixin ★274stars310 - TimerMixin provides timer functions for executing code in the future that are safely cleaned up when the component unmounts. This is a fork that includes react-native InteractionManager support.
  • react-native-tabbar ★261stars264 - Tab bar with more freedom
  • react-native-cacheable-image ★255stars298 - A filesystem cacheable image component for react-native
  • react-native-awesome-button ★222stars235 - A React Native component rendering a button supporting showing different appearances and functionality given the passed props
  • react-native-mobx ★220stars222 - Make your app reactive with MobX and react-native-router-flux
  • react-native-progress-bar ★218stars241 - An animated progress bar component for React Native
  • react-native-tooltip ★217stars268 - A react-native wrapper for showing tooltips
  • react-native-emoji ★216stars320 - Emoji component for React Native
  • react-native-image-cache-hoc ★211stars269 - Higher Order Component that adds advanced caching and persistence functionality to standard Image component.
  • autoresponsive-react-native ★201stars251 - A Magical Layout Library For React
  • react-native-autolink ★201stars407 - Autolinking component for React Native

  • react-native-dotenv ★450stars899 - A Babel preset let you import application configs from .env file (zero runtime dependency)
  • react-native-social-share ★347stars406 - Use the iOS native Twitter and Facebook share view from react native
  • react-native-ibeacon ★334stars360 - iBeacon support for React Native. The API is very similar to the CoreLocation Objective-C one with the only major difference that regions are plain JavaScript objects. Beacons don't work in the iOS simulator.
  • react-native-motion-manager ★223stars237 - A react-native interface for using the Gyroscope, Accelerometer and Magnetometer
  • react-native-device ★185stars181 - UIDevice wrapper for React Native
  • react-native-sensor-manager ★172stars215 - Wrapper for react-native providing native sensors access. (Gyroscope, accelerometer, magnetometer, thermometer...)
  • react-native-haptic ★137stars198 - iOS 10 + haptic feedback for React Native applications
  • react-native-discovery ★89stars106 - Discover nearby devics using BLE. Turn iOS and Android devices into beacons
  • react-native-passcode-auth ★87stars100 - React Native authentication with iOS Passcode.
  • react-native-fingerprint-identify ★79stars83 - React Native authentication with the Fingerprint on Android, fingerprint API compatible lib, which also combines Samsung, Xiaomi and MeiZu's official Fingerprint API.
  • react-native-calendar-reminders ★69stars83 - React Native module for IOS EventKit Reminders
  • react-native-bluetooth-state ★61stars70 - Answering the question of "Is my bluetooth on?" in React Native
  • react-native-clipboard ★58stars63 - React Native component for getting or setting clipboard content
  • react-native-android-sms ★48stars55 - A react native android module to list/send sms.
  • react-native-android-speech ★47stars47 - A text-to-speech library for Android React Native.
  • react-native-app-info ★42stars42 - React Native app info and version
  • react-native-icloud-sync ★41stars49 - A react-native wrapper for syncing with icloud
  • react-native-carrier-info ★41stars69 - React Native module bridge to obtain information about the user’s home cellular service provider.

  • react-native-device-battery ★30stars40 - Observe battery state changes in your react native application
